positive: A whimsical portrait of a curious fox wearing a tiny aviator cap, sitting atop a stack of antique books in a sun-drenched Parisian library, cinematic volumetric lighting, hyperdetailed, octane render, soft bokeh background, vibrant colors, Studio Ghibli inspired, --ar 1:1
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, signature, out of frame
